name: Cinnacino
intro: Cinnamon luxury! Cinnacino is like a cappuccino, with cinnamon to make you feel warm if you eat a raw-food meal. It helps to stabilize blood sugar and will also stand in for a sweet treat after the meal. You can make it with either warm or cold water. Here, I use white almond butter or unsalted cashew butter.
method: Heat up the water if you want a warm Cinnacino. Mix water, nut butter, coconut palm sugar, and cinnamon in a blender.
